recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.

recommendations.title: Heyy Babyy
recommendations.overview: Three womanisers find a baby left at their doorstep. Chaos ensues as they try to contact their former girlfriends to determine who is the father amongst them.

recommendations.title: The Age of Innocence
recommendations.overview: In 19th century New York high society, a young lawyer falls in love with a woman separated from her husband, while he is engaged to the woman's cousin.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun..!
recommendations.overview: Prem and Nisha meet and fall in love at the wedding of their elder siblings, but their plans to be together are put in jeopardy when Nisha's sister dies, leaving behind a baby.

recommendations.title: Prem Ratan Dhan Payo
recommendations.overview: While recovering from an assassination attempt four days before his coronation, a stern prince is replaced by a romantic lookalike.

recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.
